positive: A clean, high-contrast symmetrical design featuring a stylized cosmic fox in a centered silhouette. The fox's fur seamlessly transitions into bioluminescent nebulae patterns, mixing shades of deep indigo, vibrant teal, and sapphire blue. The background is a minimalist celestial void filled with geometric stars and subtle ringed planetary structures. The style is a blend of vector illustration and ethereal bioluminescence, emphasizing strong negative space and clean edges. Perfect for screen printing, graphic appeal, highly detailed, perfect symmetry, flat depth, dramatic studio lighting.
negative: blur, noisy, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, messy, complex background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, malformed hands, dirty, clutter, jpeg artifacts, childish, graffiti, logos, trademarks
